title: Tower T27031 Deep Filled Sandwich Maker with Non-Stick Coated Plate and Automatic Temperature Control, 900W, Stainless Steel
features: POWERFUL 900W: Provides a fast heat up time, letting you efficiently grill two toasties within minutes
EXTRA-DEEP FILLED PLATES: Pack your sandwich full of flavourful ingredients and create the perfectly sealed snack without the need to flip
NON-STICK COATING: Remove the need for oil or butter so you can enjoy a healthier sandwich and clean the plates easier after use
POWER ON/READY INDICATOR LIGHTS: Lets you know when the maker is ready to be used for simple operation
3 YEAR WARRANTY: Comes with a standard 1 year guarantee, extending by an additional 2 years once you register the product online
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value. Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products A quick and efficient way of creating the perfect snack. This Tower deep filled sandwich maker features 900W of power, creating delicious flavourful sandwiches in minutes, without the need to flip. The non-stick ceramic plates are deep, letting you fill your sandwich with more ingredients, while also removing the need for oil or butter to create a healthier snack. This toastie maker features power on/ready indicator lights, so you know when it’s ready to be used. 900W deep sandwich maker for fast heat up and grilling toasties in minutes Non-stick coating plates for easy cleaning Safety cut out provides added peace of mind Automatic temperature control for perfect results every time Cool touch handles for safe and comfortable handling No need for oil or butter for healthier cooking NON-STICK COATING Remove the need for oil or butter so you can enjoy a healthier snacks and clean the plates easier after use EXTRA-DEEP FILLED PLATES Create thick and flavourful sandwiches all perfectly sealed without having to flip COOL TOUCH HANDLES & LOCKING HATCH Safely handle the maker and check on the sandwiches during cooking
